title: Delicate Norwegian Salmon with Blackeye Pea Rice Bowl
description: A light and flavorful dish featuring Norwegian salmon paired with a side of blackeye pea rice and delicate onigiri.
instructions: 2. Season the salmon fillets with salt, sugar, and a drizzle of sesame oil.
3. Bake the salmon in the oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
4. In a separate pan, heat some sesame oil and cook the blackeye peas for 2-3 minutes.
5. Prepare the onigiri by filling the nori sheets with a small amount of cooked Japanese short grain rice.
6. To assemble the dish, place a portion of blackeye pea rice on a plate, followed by a piece of baked salmon, and finish with a delicate onigiri on top.
